title: Forecast accuracy jumps to 76% after Stage 4 close-date validation
anchor: The validation rule deployed April 17th forces close-date accuracy at the gate, lifting forecast-to-actual across three forecast windows from 58% to 76%.
connect: Commit-tier deals show the strongest improvement in the accuracy lift.
body: The validation rule deployed April 17th forces close-date accuracy at the gate, lifting forecast-to-actual across three forecast windows from 58% to 76%. Commit-tier deals show the strongest improvement in the accuracy lift.
trace: Stage 4 close-date validation rule deployment correlates with 18-point forecast accuracy improvement.

title: Wednesday forecast call runs 28 minutes versus 90-minute baseline
anchor: Pipeline health report prep automation deployed April 21st cuts the Wednesday forecast call from the 90-minute average across eight prior weeks to 28 minutes this week.
connect: The call now opens from a single reconciled view between Clari and Salesforce.
body: Pipeline health report prep automation deployed April 21st cuts the Wednesday forecast call from the 90-minute average across eight prior weeks to 28 minutes this week. The call now opens from a single reconciled view between Clari and Salesforce.
trace: Pipeline prep automation reducing forecast call duration by 68% from baseline.
